title: Natural Jute Twine - Strong, Durable, Biodegradable Garden Twine for Gardening, Floristry, and Bundling - Made from 100% Natural Jute - Affordable (Green Jute & Natural Jute - (Brown), 2 Balls)
features: 🌿Strong and durable: Jute twine is strong and durable enough to hold up to heavy loads.
🌿Biodegradable: Jute twine is biodegradable, so it's a sustainable choice for the environment.
🌿Affordable: Jute twine is an affordable option for a variety of projects.
🌿Long-lasting: Jute twine is long-lasting and can be used over and over again.
🌿90 meters (approx. 300 feet) of strong, durable natural jute twine Made from 100% natural, biodegradable jute
🌿Ideal for a variety of gardening, floristry, and bundling projects
🌿Perfect for tying up plants, staking tomatoes, and creating flower arrangements
description: 🌿A 90m ball of strong natural jute twine is the perfect tool for a variety of gardening, floristry, and bundling projects. Made from 100% natural, biodegradable jute, this twine is strong, durable, and long-lasting. It is easy to use and knot, and it is perfect for tying up plants, staking tomatoes, and creating flower arrangements. 🌿 This twine is also affordable, making it a great value for the price. Natural jute twine is a versatile material that can be used for a variety of projects, including: 🌿Gardening: Tie up plants, stakes, and tomato cages. 🌿Floristry: Create flower arrangements and bouquets. 🌿Bundling: Tie up packages, bundles of wood, and other items. 🌿Crafts: Make macrame wall hangings, dreamcatchers, and other decorative items. Jute twine is also a great choice for a variety of other projects, such as: 🌿Securing tarps and other outdo or gear. 🌿Marking trails and boundaries. 🌿Creating temporary repairs. Order your 90m ball of strong natural jute twine today and see for yourself how versatile and useful this material is!
